  • weekly picks (Mar 1 week 2026)

  • A WordCloud of 2026 Mar 1st week collection

    ===This week’s pick===

    • Score :
    Unfold/Fold

    03/04

    1. s41567-026-03181-y A universal scheme to self-test any quantum state or measurement (Nature Physics)

    2. s41563-026-02515-8 Texture-dependent all-optical switching in ferromagnetic films via stochastic nucleation of nanoscale domains (Nature Materials)

    3. d41586-026-00662-1 Why ‘quantum proteins’ could be the next big thing in biology (Nature)

    4. s41598-026-41078-1 Construction of automatic air monitoring point siting model based on convolutional neural network and K-means clustering (Scientific Reports)

    5. s41598-026-41824-5 Validation of AI-enhanced ECG image analysis for identifying extreme cardiac magnetic resonance metrics in a cross-ethnic UK biobank study (Scientific Reports)

    6. qbs6-nj3l Operational quasiprobability in quantum thermodynamics: Work extraction by coherence and nonjoint measurability (PRR)

    7. 58g1-c78g Unifying renormalized and bare viscosity in two-dimensional molecular dynamics simulations (PRR)

    8. 59st-f1mb Optomechanical separation of transverse spin and orbital energy flows in liquid crystals (PRR)

    9. 7gtb-x5pm Broadband ellipsometry study of the anisotropic dielectric response of ${\mathrm{YAlO}}_{3}$ (PRR)

    10. 6t8x-mbsd Interlayer stacking controls the electronic properties of the van der Waals material $1T−{\mathrm{TaS}}_{2}$ (PRRL)

    11. bnnl-xnm6 Transport-generated signals uncover geometric features of evolving branched structures (PRRL)
